title: HardCraft
description: A mod that makes minecraft harder
body:
This mod adds new mechanics that make basic Minecraft playthrough more difficult. At the moment is in BETA testing.

# Mechanics

## Block armor
In this mod zombies and skeletons can wear blocks as armor. If you have the normal mode of the mod, you will not be able to get a mob with a strong block at the beginning of the game, but on the hard mode zombies with obsidian can appear at the beginning.![Zombie and skeletons](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78131e0c25f3fb6bfd4181236e7fbc10db715349_0.webp)

## Regeneration and blood
Now regenerating health through eating food doesn't work. Now regeneration happens if you have enough blood or with the help of medicine. If the blood values are low, you will die.

- **Plantain** - grows in the forest. Stops the bleeding.
- **Bandage** - created from wool and thread. Can be used 4 times. Stops the bleeding.
- **Medicinal mixture** - brewed in the Brewing Stand from plantain. Regenerates 0.5 hearts.
- **Syringe** - created in Brewing Stand from golden apple. Regenerates 2 hearts.
- **Medical kit** - created from Medicinal mixture, syringe, bandages. Can be used 2 times. Regenerates 3 hearts and stops the bleeding.![Items for HP regeneration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/83e5092dec5fe2ff598cfeb410538c900e97da28.png)

## Mob effect
With some chance, mobs will receive amplified effects.

## Hot Core
Now being at the depth of a mine or in the nether is not safe and the player will start to burn. To save the player can use a fire resistance potion or Ice armor.

## Hidden traps
Just walking through the forest can also be dangerous, as there are traps with dynamite and a potion dispenser. There are also traps from the End that can also ruin your day.![Potion trap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a681bc4de963830e00473bcc63ecc5abb24728d6.png)

## Custom Craft
Now some of the recipes have been changed.

## Acid Rain
Now even the morning rain is dangerous because someone has added acid to the rains.

## Meteorite
You still think flying rocks aren't dangerous? Now meteorites will fall from the sky. In hard mode meteorites will spawn more often. You can also turn off the meteorite drops![Meteorite](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7d73672938181768285f5c44ec7bed91b02e4b_0.webp).

## Parasite
Now drowning in water can lead to poisoning and a parasite. To prevent the parasite from killing you, you must take an antidote.

## Strange mixture
Do you want to become strong to defend yourself against endless waves of monsters? For this purpose I added Strange mixture, but there is one problem with the mixture...

## Dark night
Sometimes the night can be dark, making it hard to see and the mobs stronger.

## Bedrock ore and drill
Now in Bedrock you can find ore that will be mined forever! But for this you need a special drill together with the drill head.![Bedrock drill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06f7eba0291063ae096e2a88fb3c553761f0d1a1.png)

# Mobs

## Face

- HP : 1
- Damage : 5
- Speed : High
- XP : 3
![Face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5704dcbb8769a5bbf4f8c6a00a5e6670bb2eb4c4_0.webp)

## Nether Face

- HP : 2
- Damage : 8
- Speed : High
- XP : 6
![Nether Face](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a69a5956cc7ba2d95708504e8463394528c3c88_0.webp)
